violations.text: The following equipment was observed in poor repair: 1) The hot water control to the faucet handle of the left side hand washing sink located in the bar area was not dispensing water 2) A chest freezer door was observed coming off of the hinges 3) The 3 Door Reach-In Cooler was observed to have torn gaskets Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The drain to the prep sink was observed to be slowly draining, backing up, and overflowing into a bucket below the air break when large amounts of liquid are drained quickly. Plumbing system is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking a proper air gap (Currently equipped with an air break). The air break is to be adjusted to a proper air gap not allowing for waste in the drainpipe to possibly contact and contaminate the prep sink where food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The corner wall and floor under and behind the dish washing area was observed to have a buildup of soil, residue, and debris. Physical facilities are to be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

The cement step leading from the kitchen area into the backroom was chipped/cracked and in poor repair causing a possible trip point. Establishment physical facilities are to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC instructed to use three bay sink until service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2024

The doors to the outside, located in two back entrances, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024

The following equipment was observed in poor repair: 1) The left handle of hand washing sink faucet located in the bar area was not dispensing water 2) A chest freezer door was observed coming off of the hinges New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration units at the bar have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2024
The plumbing under both the three bay sink and food prep were in poor repair (active leak observed). New Violation. Correct By: 08/23/2024
Several ceiling tiles were observed in poor repair throughout back area of establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
